mission.title: Install and Configure Confidential Containers on Kubernetes
mission.description: Confidential Containers is an open-source community focused on leveraging Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) to enhance the security of containers and data, enabling cloud-native confidential computing. Installing it allows you to enforce application security requirements and deploy unmodified containers securely.

steps.title: Install the Confidential Containers operator
steps.description:
Deploy the operator from the official release:
```bash
export CC_VERSION=v0.11.0
kubectl apply -k github.com/confidential-containers/operator/config/release?ref=${CC_VERSION}
```

steps.title: Create a CcRuntime resource
steps.description:
Deploy the confidential containers runtime:
```bash
kubectl apply -f - << 'EOF'
apiVersion: confidentialcontainers.org/v1beta1
kind: CcRuntime
metadata:
  name: ccruntime
spec:
  runtimeClass: kata-clh
EOF
```
Wait for the runtime to be installed:
```bash
kubectl wait --for=condition=Ready ccruntime/ccruntime --timeout=300s
```

steps.title: Deploy a confidential workload
steps.description:
Run a test pod with the confidential runtime:
```bash
kubectl apply -f - << 'EOF'
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: cc-test
spec:
  runtimeClassName: kata-clh
  containers:
  - name: test
    image: busybox
    command: ["sleep", "3600"]
EOF
```

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n confidential-containers-system
kubectl get runtimeclass
kubectl get ccruntime
```

troubleshooting.title: Runtime not installing
troubleshooting.description:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app=cc-operator -n confidential-containers-system
```
Requires hardware TEE support (Intel TDX, AMD SEV, etc.).

troubleshooting.title: Pod stuck in ContainerCreating
troubleshooting.description:
Verify the RuntimeClass exists:
```bash
kubectl get runtimeclass
kubectl describe pod cc-test
```

troubleshooting.title: Attestation failures
troubleshooting.description: Check the KBS (Key Broker Service) configuration and connectivity.

resolution.summary: Confidential Containers operator is installed with TEE-based runtime for running encrypted workloads.

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have a Kubernetes cluster running and kubectl installed on your local machine.
